rationale.fidelity: Correctly retains here-and-now allocation, fixed stock, correlated demand, lost sales, no transfers, and expected shortage-plus-holding cost.
rationale.managerial_framing: Makes the concentration-versus-coverage tension, timing, mechanism, outcomes, and alternative allocation explicit.
rationale.scholarly_positioning: Bounds the result but provides no literature relationship or research contribution claim.
rationale.evidence_discipline: Carefully distinguishes the supplied demand assumption from facts and disclaims deployment savings and recourse conclusions.
rationale.prose_clarity: Clear, economical, and well organized with slight repetition.
rationale.overall: A fully faithful and well-bounded business framing with no hard failure.
